name: Invoice
definition: EN 16931 invoice semantic root.

name: Invoice number
definition: An invoice shall have an invoice number.

name: Invoice issue date
definition: The date when the invoice was issued.

name: Invoice type code
definition: Code specifying the functional type of invoice.

name: Document currency code
definition: The currency in which all Invoice amounts are given, except for the Total VAT amount in accounting currency.

name: Tax accounting currency code
definition: The currency used for VAT accounting and reporting purposes as accepted or required in the country of the Seller.

name: Value added tax point date
definition: The date when the VAT becomes accountable for the Seller and for the Buyer in so far as that date can be determined and differs from the date of issue of the invoice, according to the VAT directive.

name: Value added tax point date code
definition: The code of the date when the VAT becomes accountable for the Seller and for the Buyer.

name: Payment due date
definition: The date when the payment is due.

name: Buyer reference
definition: An identifier assigned by the Buyer used for internal routing purposes.

name: Contract reference
